headline: Stock Market Today: Indexes Volatile; Micron Surges, But Apple Makes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
summary: The stock market was volatile Thursday morning, reversing lower in the opening phase before quickly rebounding.  Apple stock tumbled and technology stocks in general reversed lower.  The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes opened higher on the stock market today after a stronger-than-expected GDP reading.

headline: Ross Stores Jumps 80% in a Year: How to Play the Stock?
summary: ROST stock surges nearly 80% in a year as strong traffic, merchandising gains and store expansion bolster sales momentum and its growth outlook.

raw.headline: Ross Stores Jumps 80% in a Year: How to Play the Stock?
raw.summary: ROST stock surges nearly 80% in a year as strong traffic, merchandising gains and store expansion bolster sales momentum and its growth outlook.

headline: Ross Stores Defies the Age of E-Commerce. The Stock Has More Room to Rally.
summary: From screen-time eyestrain to social media’s negative impact on mental health, there are plenty of reasons to get offline even as technology takes over more aspects of our lives.  Off-price retailers like  Ross Stores  are living proof that analog can thrive in the age of e-commerce.  Investors might be hesitant to invest in Ross Stores after the shares soared some 80% in the past year, but consider another double-digit number: 17%.

headline: Ross Stores Inc (NASDAQ:ROST) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Strong ROIC and Financial Health
summary: Ross Stores (ROST) passes the Caviar Cruise stock screen with strong 33.76% ROIC and 44.5% EBIT growth, highlighting its quality investing profile despite a premium valuation.
